generated_oml:
instance TemperatureSensorDS18S201 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer with unique 64-bit serial code, measuring temperatures from -55°C to +125°C with ±0.5°C accuracy between -10°C to +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmission
]

instance TemperatureSensorDS18S202 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer with unique 64-bit serial code, measuring temperatures from -55°C to +125°C with ±0.5°C accuracy between -10°C to +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmission
]

instance TemperatureSensorDS18S203 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer with unique 64-bit serial code, measuring temperatures from -55°C to +125°C with ±0.5°C accuracy between -10°C to +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmission
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensorDS18S201, TemperatureSensorDS18S202, TemperatureSensorDS18S203
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature measurements from DS18S20 sensors used for model validation and parameter estimation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyEnabler
]

instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Two-parameter dynamic thermal model for incubator temperature prediction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyEnabler
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Four-parameter dynamic thermal model for incubator temperature prediction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyEnabler
]

instance RabbitMQEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker serving as communication channel for sensor data transmission to Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService
]

instance ScipyEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy library for non-linear least squares optimization"
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationService
]

instance GitHubEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "GitHub repository for open-source implementation"
    DTDFVocab:enables VersionControlService
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation models (Model A and B) for temperature prediction"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePredictionInsight
]

instance CalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms using non-linear least squares optimization to update model parameters"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelParameterOptimizationInsight
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Monitoring services to assess safety and optimality of system operation"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolationInsight, OptimalityInsight, AdjustParametersAction
]

instance VersionControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Version control for Digital Twin open-source implementation"
    DTDFVocab:provides CodeRepositoryInsight
]

instance TemperaturePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature values from simulation models"
]

instance ModelParameterOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized model parameters from non-linear least squares calibration"
]

instance SafetyViolationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected safety violations in system operation"
]

instance OptimalityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Assessment of system operation optimality"
]

instance CodeRepositoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Open-source code repository management"
]

instance AdjustParametersAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Bang-bang control adjustment using LL, UL, H, and C parameters"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance InsulatedContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container with 0.03 m³ air volume"
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed of size 214×214×3 mm controlled via MOSFETs and optocouplers for current handling"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "12V/24V fan with 0.02 m³/s airflow for air circulation"
]

instance RaspberryPiController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller handling GPIO for actuation"
]

instance CustomPCB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Custom PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for handling ~4A current"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply unit for the thermal incubator system"
]

instance ThermalIncubatorEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Thermal incubator system regulating internal temperature regardless of external conditions"
    base:contains InsulatedContainer, Heatbed, Fan, TemperatureSensorDS18S201, TemperatureSensorDS18S202, TemperatureSensorDS18S203, RaspberryPiController, CustomPCB, PowerSupply
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Commands to control the heatbed and fan are sent from the controller via RabbitMQ to the low-level driver, which executes actuation commands on the hardware components."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated components include RabbitMQ communication server, low-level driver, controller, and simulation models; data flows from physical sensors to RabbitMQ, processed by the controller for decision-making and actuation."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin operates in the 'as operated' phase, integrating models post-deployment for real-time monitoring and control of the physical system."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model B validated as superior for predicting thermal inertia; assumptions tested via experiments (e.g., temperature uniformity), with residual error minimized through optimization to ensure model accuracy."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ (AMQP protocol) running on Raspberry Pi for inter-component communication between physical sensors and Digital Twin services."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All Digital Twin components (RabbitMQ server, controller, low-level driver) hosted on Raspberry Pi 4 Model B."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Low-level driver incorporates a safe protocol to maintain device safety; specific cybersecurity measures not detailed in the document."
]
